title: Savory Chewy Adventurous Italian Tamarind Paste Stir-fry
description: A savory and chewy Sicilian-inspired dish featuring tamarind paste with a mediterranean twist, ideal for adding an adventurous kick to your meals.

ingredients.name: 1 cup Italian Tamarind Paste
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality tamarind paste that is not overly sweet.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons Bhuna Masala Powder
ingredients.notes: A mix of Indian spices for a robust flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 can (14 oz) Black Beans
ingredients.notes: Drained and rinsed, adds texture to the dish.

ingredients.name: 1 bell Pepper (any color)
ingredients.notes: Sliced thinly, for color and added crunch.

ingredients.name: 1 cup Spinach Leaves
ingredients.notes: Washed and dried, for freshness and green color.

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Italian Tamarind Paste and Bhuna Masala Powder to the heated oil. Stir continuously until it turns golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped Garlic, Onion, and sliced bell pepper to the pan, cook for another 5 minutes or until vegetables are slightly softened.
Stir in the drained Black Beans and spinach leaves, mix well, and let simmer for an additional 4 minutes until all ingredients are heated evenly.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled chicken or fish. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
